# Agentic Fullstack

Source pack: `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/`

## Load These Files

1. `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/README.md`
2. `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/feature-slicing.md`
3. `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/contracts.md`
4. `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/end-to-end.md`
5. `.agent-context/skills/fullstack/release-coordination.md`

## Workflow

1. Slice work by business capability, not by technical layer only.
2. Keep API contract and UI assumptions in sync.
3. Verify complete user journey after code changes.
4. Include rollback-safe notes for risky releases.
